name: COMPAGNIE FINANCIERE RICHEMONT
summary: Compagnie Financière Richemont SA is a Swiss luxury goods holding company that owns several of the world's leading luxury brands. The company's portfolio includes brands such as Cartier, Van Cleef & Arpels, Piaget, and Montblanc, specializing in jewelry, watches, writing instruments, and leather goods. Richemont is headquartered in Bellevue, Switzerland.
